reason: Create PG-backed campaign lifecycle proof tests — 14 test suites covering full happy path, cold-start reconstruction, binder evidence, terminal state persistence, critic rejection, claims gate, validation freshness, red-team blocking, and binder finalization.
Rewrite PG-backed lifecycle tests using proper test infrastructure: pgTestLayer fixture, correct Layer chain, comprehensive state machine phase traversal
Remove unused imports — Secretary already wraps BinderService and EventStore internally via its layer
Re-add EventStore import — Secretary.layer requires EventStore.Service which must be provided via Layer chain
